features: UP TO 100% LIMESCALE REMOVAL: Say goodbye to stubborn build-up with this powerful ready to use limescale remover. Elbow Grease Kettle Descale keeps your appliance free from limescale build up, which can affect performance and damage to the heating element, shortening it's working life. Keep your appliance performing, treat once every 3 months in hard water areas, once every six in soft water areas.

QUICK & EASY KETTLE DESCALE: Ready to use sachet. No complicated steps — simply drop the descaler bag into your boiled kettle for 10-15 minutes, and let it work its magic. Perfect for busy households looking for a no-fuss solution to tackle limescale.

SUITABLE FOR ALL KETTLES: Electric or stovetop, this versatile kettle cleaner works effortlessly across all makes and models. No need to worry about compatibility — just clean, clear results every time.

IDEAL FOR HARD WATER AREAS: Keep your appliance clean, treat once every 3 months in hard water areas to prevent heavy limescale build-up. Keeps your appliance performing at its best, to help you enjoy a perfect cup of tea or coffee.

SIMPLE DROP IN BAG FOR MESS-FREE USE: Elbow Grease Kettle Descale the only cleaner you'll ever need. No need to measure powders or handle liquids. The convenient drop-in bag design makes descaling simple and clean, with no mess left behind. Use as directed disposing of the descaler bag after use.
ENERGY EFFICIENT CLEANING: A clean kettle heating element, cleans water faster, saving energy and time. Maintain a clean descaled kettle to maintain an energy efficient appliance.

ESSENTIAL ADDITION TO CLEANING PRODUCTS: Another amazing Elbow Grease product in the fight against limescale. This descaler bag fits perfectly into any cleaning routine, ensuring appliances stay in top efficient condition.
REGULAR MAINTENANCE MADE EASY: To keep your kettle in top condition, use this descaler once every 3 months in hard water areas and every 6 months in soft water areas.
SAFE AND EFFECTIVE CLEANING: The Elbow Grease Kettle Descaler is tough on limescale but gentle on your kettle. It works without harsh scrubbing, ensuring a safe and thorough clean every time.
PROLONGS YOUR KETTLES LIFESPAN: Regular descaling helps protect the heating element from limescale build-up, extending the lifespan of your kettle. Keep your appliance running smoothly for longer.
description: Product Description Say goodbye to stubborn limescale with Elbow Grease Kettle Descale. Designed to tackle tough build-ups, this powerful kettle cleaner works fast to restore your kettle to its best. Hard water areas can cause limescale to build up quickly, affecting the taste of your drinks and shortening your appliance’s life. This easy-to-use descale bag is the only cleaner you'll ever need to keep your kettle performing like new. Simply drop it in and let it do the hard work, leaving your kettle sparkling clean and limescale-free.Limescale doesn’t just make your kettle look unsightly—it can also slow down boiling times and increase energy consumption. Elbow Grease Kettle Descale works effectively to dissolve tough limescale, improving your kettle’s performance and saving energy. Suitable for all kettles, it’s a convenient solution for every household. Whether you live in a hard water area or simply want to keep your appliances in top condition, regular descaling helps prevent damage and ensures better-tasting beverages. Keep your kettle clean and working efficiently with this simple, no-fuss descaling solution. Ingredients Contains: Citric Acid Anhydrous CAS No. 77-92-9 Directions Kettle: * Fill the kettle halfway with water and allow to boil * Unplug the kettle and add 1 descaler bag * Leave to work for 10-15 minutes * If all the limescale is not completely removed, turn the kettle back on and heat again, but do not boil * Empty kettle and dispose of used sachet * Fill kettle and boil, then dispose of water before use To keep your appliances working as they should, treat them once every 3 months in hard water areas and once every 6 months in soft water areas See more
